tags.name: Spectrum Leisure Centre
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free route to Leisure Centre is via a long, steep (1:8, 12%) ramp.

tags.name: Spectrum Leisure Centre
tags.wheelchair:description: Step-free to Blue Badge spaces in Park & Ride car park >100m. NB. Route 100 to Friary Bus Station is only FREE with Disabled Bus Pass.

tags.name: Lawn Road
tags.wheelchair:description: Park & Ride 200 calls here. Step-free to stop opposite via controlled crossing 25m to south. Access to Clinics in Buryfields via Lawn Road has steep (10%) gradient down for 100m.

tags.name: Lawn Road
tags.wheelchair:description: This stop is south of Lawn Road (OSM has been edited) Park & Ride 200 calls here. Stop opposite accessible via controlled crossing 40m to north. Access to Clinics in Buryfields via Lawn Road has steep (10%) gradient down for 100m.

tags.fixme: The poster here states that this bus stop does not have any buses currently serving it, but the structure still exists.  The signage has also been removed such that it has no name.
